queries.question: What is the content type, title and premiere date where user rating is equal to 5
queries.sql: Select type, title, premiereMonth FROM Content JOIN Reviews ON Reviews.Contentid=Content.id WHERE rating=5;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?type ?title ?premieremonth WHERE {
  ?content a :Content .
  ?reviews a :Reviews .
  ?reviews p:hasContent ?content .
  ?content p:type ?type .
  ?content p:title ?title .
  ?content p:premiereMonth ?premieremonth .
  ?reviews p:rating ?rating_f .
  FILTER(?rating_f = 5)
}

queries.question: What's the type, name, genre and premiere month of the content?

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
